channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-5899] Interop 2.6.0<->2.7 sanity test_160a: FAIL: fid in changelog != file fidure
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/b8436092-68f4-11e4-9444-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_160a failed with the following error:

fid in changelog != file fid [0x200002b11:0x5f:0x0]

test log

== sanity test 160a: changelog sanity == 15:28:06 (1415402886)
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl --device lustre-MDT0000 changelog_register -n
Registered as changelog user cl1
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_users
6 01CREAT 23:28:06.931620579 2014.11.07 0x0 t=[0x200002b11:0x60:0x0] j=pic1.jpg p=[0x200002b11:0x5e:0x0] 
7 08RENME 23:28:06.946620594 2014.11.07 0x0 t=[0:0x0:0x0] p=[0x200002b11:0x59:0x0]  s=[0x200002b11:0x5e:0x0] sp=[0x200002b11:0x5a:0x0] 
8 03HLINK 23:28:06.953620601 2014.11.07 0x0 t=[0x200002b11:0x60:0x0] j=portland.jpg p=[0x200002b11:0x5a:0x0] 
9 04SLINK 23:28:06.957620604 2014.11.07 0x0 t=[0x200002b11:0x61:0x0] j=desktop.jpg p=[0x200002b11:0x59:0x0] 
10 06UNLNK 23:28:06.962620610 2014.11.07 0x1 t=[0x200002b11:0x61:0x0] j=desktop.jpg p=[0x200002b11:0x59:0x0] 
verifying changelog mask
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask=-MKDIR
mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask=-MKDIR
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask=+CLOSE
mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask=+CLOSE
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask=+MKDIR
mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask=+MKDIR
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask
CMD: onyx-44vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask=-CLOSE
mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask=-CLOSE
1 02MKDIR 23:28:06.894620540 2014.11.07 0x0 t=[0x200002b11:0x58:0x0] j=d160a.sanity p=[0x200000007:0x1:0x0] 
2 02MKDIR 23:28:06.899620547 2014.11.07 0x0 t=[0x200002b11:0x59:0x0] j=pics p=[0x200002b11:0x58:0x0] 
3 02MKDIR 23:28:06.902620548 2014.11.07 0x0 t=[0x200002b11:0x5a:0x0] j=2008 p=[0x200002b11:0x59:0x0] 
4 02MKDIR 23:28:06.913620561 2014.11.07 0x0 t=[0x200002b11:0x5e:0x0] j=zachy p=[0x200002b11:0x5a:0x0] 
5 01CREAT 23:28:06.921620569 2014.11.07 0x0 t=[0x200002b11:0x5f:0x0] j=timestamp p=[0x200002b11:0x5e:0x0] 
6 01CREAT 23:28:06.931620579 2014.11.07 0x0 t=[0x200002b11:0x60:0x0] j=pic1.jpg p=[0x200002b11:0x5e:0x0] 
7 08RENME 23:28:06.946620594 2014.11.07 0x0 t=[0:0x0:0x0] p=[0x200002b11:0x59:0x0]  s=[0x200002b11:0x5e:0x0] sp=[0x200002b11:0x5a:0x0] 
8 03HLINK 23:28:06.953620601 2014.11.07 0x0 t=[0x200002b11:0x60:0x0] j=portland.jpg p=[0x200002b11:0x5a:0x0] 
9 04SLINK 23:28:06.957620604 2014.11.07 0x0 t=[0x200002b11:0x61:0x0] j=desktop.jpg p=[0x200002b11:0x59:0x0] 
10 06UNLNK 23:28:06.962620610 2014.11.07 0x1 t=[0x200002b11:0x61:0x0] j=desktop.jpg p=[0x200002b11:0x59:0x0] 
11 01CREAT 23:28:07.758620647 2014.11.07 0x0 t=[0x200002b11:0x66:0x0] j=file p=[0x200002b11:0x5e:0x0] 
12 11CLOSE 23:28:07.762620647 2014.11.07 0x242 t=[0x200002b11:0x66:0x0]
13 02MKDIR 23:28:08.552620647 2014.11.07 0x0 t=[0x200002b11:0x6a:0x0] j=sofia p=[0x200002b11:0x5a:0x0] 
14 13TRUNC 23:28:08.563620647 2014.11.07 0xe t=[0x200002b11:0x66:0x0]
verifying target fid
 sanity test_160a: @@@@@@ FAIL: fid in changelog != file fid [0x200002b11:0x5f:0x0] 
  Trace dump:

Info required for matching: sanity 160a
item.summary: Interop 2.6.0<->2.7 sanity test_160a: FAIL: fid in changelog != file fidure

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: The patch being developed for LU-5862 should address this issue as well.

Henri,
Do you have any suggestions for this?
Thank you!
